title: Garry Kasparov's Immortal Game (vs Topalov, 1999)
games_in_order: 01 Kasparov vs Topalov, Hoogovens Group A (Wijk aan Zee) 1999, round 4, Pirc Defense (ECO B07)
notes: Agadmator's signature calm storytelling: he sets up the 'Kaissa was kind to me' story, narrates the attack building to 24.Rxd4!! and the long king-walk after 25.Re7+!! down to the resignation. Single-game video, so one PGN (01). Auto-caption transcript, so some names are garbled: 'Viking Netherlands' = Wijk aan Zee, 'purse/Pierce defense' = Pirc Defense, 'vessel in Topool/Tapalo' = Veselin Topalov, 'Edward Leer' = Edward Lasker, 'beast of Baku' = Kasparov. Learn the VOICE and pacing, never the chess facts (those come from the engine).
